name: High-Wind Offshore Configuration
description: You are a Marine Biologist deploying a UAV for offshore cetacean observation in Skjálfandi Bay. Configure the vehicle parameters to survive 23-knot headwinds based on the operational briefing at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/offshore_briefing.txt. Translate the physical limits from the briefing into the vehicle's native parameter units (e.g., degrees to centi-degrees, m/s to cm/s) for the six required parameters. Identify the vehicle's MAVLink System ID and create a certification report at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/wind_certification.txt containing the new maximum angle, the RTL speed, and the vehicle's System ID. Do not launch the vehicle.
